pre_check_flags.detail: Diff size looks larger than expected: changed_lines=1829, expected≈20, ratio=91.45, files=8, hunks=17.

criteria.name: Mirrored media-understandings migration
criteria.evidence: Verified `.migrations_staging/20260514010000_message_media_understandings.sql` and `../supabase/migrations/20260514010000_message_media_understandings.sql` exist and are identical. The migration creates `public.message_media_understandings` with requested columns, PK `(message_id, attachment_index, model)`, hash partial index, kind/quality expression index, RLS, revoke, and sync_status insert.

criteria.name: Vision client module
criteria.evidence: `src/common/vision_clients.py` defines `describe_image`, `describe_video`, `_sha256`, `_is_transient_error`, and recursive `_sanitize_gemini_schema`. It uses lazy `openai` / `google.genai` imports, OpenAI Responses API via `/v1/responses`, Gemini upload/poll/generate flow, retry-once loops, base64 image materialization, and no Astrid import.

criteria.name: Cache wrappers in db/storage handlers
criteria.evidence: `src/common/storage_handler.py` has async get-by-PK, get-by-hash ordered by `created_at desc`, and upsert methods. `src/common/db_handler.py` wraps them via `_run_async_in_thread`; upsert bypasses `_live_write_allowed` and only checks `self.storage_handler`.

criteria.name: Topic editor vision tools and budget
criteria.evidence: `understand_image` and `understand_video` are in `READ_TOOL_NAMES` and `TOPIC_EDITOR_TOOLS`. `_dispatch_understand_media` resolves source-window attachments, uses sync `requests.get`, computes `_sha256`, checks PK cache then hash cache then budget, selects fast/best presets, persists rows, and returns `budget_exceeded` before API calls when the estimated cost would exceed the run budget.

criteria.name: Source payload enrichment
criteria.evidence: `_message_payload` preserves existing fields and adds `media_urls`. `_build_initial_user_payload` calls `_enrich_media_understandings`, which loops attachment indexes over the four known model presets and adds cached `media_understandings` with requested image fields and video fields when present.

criteria.name: System prompt guidance
criteria.evidence: `TOPIC_EDITOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT` now explains cached `media_understandings`, when to call `understand_image` / `understand_video`, skipping `workflow_graph`, considering `generation` with `aesthetic_quality >= 6`, and citing `technical_signal` / `subject`.

criteria.name: Stubbed vision tests
criteria.evidence: `tests/test_vision_clients.py` monkeypatches `urlopen` and injects fake `google.genai` modules. `tests/test_topic_editor_media_understanding.py` monkeypatches `requests.get` and `src.common.vision_clients` functions. No real external API calls are needed.

criteria.name: Cache/dedup/enrichment/budget test coverage
criteria.evidence: `tests/test_topic_editor_media_understanding.py` covers same-message cache-first behavior, cross-message `content_hash` dedup, payload enrichment, budget cap without API call, no budget deduction on cache hits, and tool registration.

criteria.name: Regression tests pass
criteria.evidence: Ran `python -m pytest tests/test_vision_clients.py tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py tests/test_live_storage_wrappers.py tests/test_topic_editor_media_understanding.py -q`: 39 passed, 0 failed.

criteria.name: Vision client size and boilerplate
criteria.evidence: `src/common/vision_clients.py` is 438 lines, above the requested rough 200-300 LOC target, but the file has no debug-logging boilerplate and the extra length is mostly schemas, docstrings, and error handling. Final quality judgment is subjective.

criteria.name: Attachment normalization scope
criteria.evidence: `_normalize_attachment_list` is deterministic and handles list/dict/JSON-string/invalid inputs. `_message_payload` also extracts embed media URLs, which is slightly broader than attachments-only behavior. Final scope judgment is subjective.

summary: Approved. All must criteria pass, the settled decisions were implemented, and the focused regression suite is green. The only caveat is that `vision_clients.py` is larger than the rough target, but that is a should-level quality concern rather than a blocker.

task_verdicts.reviewer_verdict: Pass. Before-execute key checks and baseline test evidence are recorded; no implementation issue found.
Pass. Mirrored migration files are present and identical with the requested schema/indexes plus acceptable project-convention constraints.
Pass. Async storage methods exist, use the requested table, hash lookup orders newest-first, and upsert has no guild gating.
Pass. Sync DB wrappers delegate via `_run_async_in_thread`; media-understanding upsert bypasses `_live_write_allowed`.
Pass. Vision clients implement the required public API, lazy SDK imports, retry, base64 handling, Gemini schema sanitization, and no Astrid runtime dependency.
Pass. `google-genai` was added while `google-generativeai` remains untouched.
Pass. Message payload now includes `media_urls`; attachment normalization handles list/dict/JSON-string shapes.
Pass. Initial payload enrichment queries the four known model presets and remains best-effort.
Pass. Vision read tools are registered and dispatched with cache-first, hash-dedup, sync download, model presets, and budget accounting.
Pass. Prompt guidance includes cached understandings, tool usage, workflow-graph filtering, quality threshold, and framing fields.
Pass. Vision client tests stub OpenAI and Gemini behavior and cover parsing, input forms, schema sanitization, missing SDK, and retry behavior.
Pass. Topic editor media-understanding tests cover cache-first, content-hash dedup, enrichment, budget cap, cache-hit cost behavior, and tool schemas.
Pass. Final targeted test run is green: 39 passed, 0 failed.

sense_check_verdicts.verdict: Confirmed. Migration files are identical and include required table, PK, indexes, RLS/revoke, and sync_status insert.
Confirmed. Storage methods are async, hash lookup orders by `created_at desc`, and upsert has no guild gating.
Confirmed. DB wrappers use `_run_async_in_thread`; upsert bypasses `_live_write_allowed`; hash lookup wrapper exists.
Confirmed. Vision module imports cleanly, public functions exist, schema sanitizer is recursive, retry-once pattern exists, and no debug logging boilerplate was found.
Confirmed. `google-genai` and existing `google-generativeai` are both present in `requirements.txt`.
Confirmed. `_message_payload` includes `media_urls`, normalizer is tolerant, and existing fields are preserved.
Confirmed. `_build_initial_user_payload` includes best-effort `media_understandings` over all four presets.
Confirmed. Vision tools are registered, cache order is PK then hash then budget, sync `requests.get` is used, `budget_exceeded` avoids API calls, and `_tool_result_content` uses `READ_TOOL_NAMES`.
Confirmed. Prompt includes all requested media-understanding editorial guidance.
Confirmed. Vision client tests pass and use stubs rather than real provider calls.
Confirmed. Cache-first, dedup, payload enrichment, budget cap, and cache-hit budget tests pass.
Confirmed. Full targeted suite passed: 39 passed, 0 failed.
Confirmed. Before-execute key verification and baseline test evidence were recorded.
